sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2023-01-01');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '2023-01-02' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, dayofweek(event_date) AS weekday FROM test_dates;
SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE dayofweek(event_date) = 0;
